mapper.insert: insert into admin_order_event_inbox( event_id, message_id, order_id, order_number, user_id, event_type, actor_type, actor_id, from_status, to_status, from_pay_status, to_pay_status, total_amount, item_count, note, routing_key, status, retry_count, failure_reason, event_time, received_time, processed_time, create_time, update_time ) values( #{eventId}, #{messageId}, #{orderId}, #{orderNumber}, #{userId}, #{eventType}, #{actorType}, #{actorId}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{fromPayStatus}, #{toPayStatus}, #{totalAmount}, #{itemCount}, #{note}, #{routingKey}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{failureReason}, #{eventTime}, #{receivedTime}, #{processedTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select:
select from admin_order_event_inbox
order by received_time desc, id desc limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}
mapper.sql: id, event_id as eventId, message_id as messageId, order_id as orderId, order_number as orderNumber, user_id as userId, event_type as eventType, actor_type as actorType, actor_id as actorId, from_status as fromStatus, to_status as toStatus, from_pay_status as fromPayStatus, to_pay_status as toPayStatus, total_amount as totalAmount, item_count as itemCount, note, routing_key as routingKey, status, retry_count as retryCount, failure_reason as failureReason, event_time as eventTime, received_time as receivedTime, processed_time as processedTime, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime
